title: BilowgllCraft
description: Build mods for people who want to complement their minecraft in an interesting way, but do not complicate it by studying a large number of mods
body:
**BilowgllCraft is a great build for those who want to immerse themselves in the fascinating world of** **Minecraft and explore its new features. It offers many interesting functions and features**

**Assembly Features**

### 1. Improved terrain:
#### • Main World: New structures have been added to make the world more diverse.
#### • Lower World: New biomes have been added to make the world more gloomy and atmospheric.
#### • End Dimension: New biomes have been added to create a unique atmosphere in the End dimension.

### 2. Decorative elements:
#### • New decorative blocks and items that can be used to decorate your world.

### 3. The losing mobs in the mob vote:
#### • New mobs that were chosen by the players as losers in the mob vote. These mobs will add more variety and interest to your game.

### 4. Chests for personal loot

### In total, there are 48 mods in the "BilowgllCraft" modpack
